name: pillow-timing-test
setup_commands: sudo apt-get install -y libtiff5-dev libjpeg8-dev libopenjp2-7-dev zlib1g-dev
sudo apt-get install -y libfreetype6-dev liblcms2-dev libwebp-dev tcl8.6-dev tk8.6-dev python3-tk
sudo apt-get install -y libharfbuzz-dev libfribidi-dev libxcb1-dev libx11-dev
test_code:
import time
from PIL import Image

def test_image_operations():
    # Create a test image
    img = Image.new('RGB', (1000, 1000), color='red')
    
    start_time = time.time()
    
    # Perform some operations
    img_resized = img.resize((500, 500))
    img_rotated = img.rotate(45)
    img_filtered = img.filter(Image.BLUR)
    
    end_time = time.time()
    
    print(f'Time taken: {end_time - start_time:.4f} seconds')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    test_image_operations()
